current_db_effect.explanation: This report translates audit artifacts into DB impact terms. It does not execute or authorize writes.

future_db_effect_if_separately_approved_.candidate_package: PKG-01 physical missing-set recovery - master-verified subset

global_db_vs_master_index_context.note: These buckets explain the audit landscape. They are not insertion, deletion, or cleanup authority.

before_fields.name: Team Galactic's Invention G-107 Technical Machine

proposed_after_fields.name: Team Galactic's Invention G-107 Technical Machine

rollback_fields_from_snapshot.name: Team Galactic's Invention G-107 Technical Machine

gates_still_blocking_writes: No operator approval has been recorded for exact row IDs and intended mutations.
No fresh production before-state snapshot has been captured immediately before execution.
non_authority_rules: dry-run package completion is not write authorization.
apply design completion is not write authorization.
DB writes require a separate approved execution artifact.

source_statuses.write_readiness_conclusion: No catalog writes are authorized yet. The Master Index is complete, PKG-01 dry-run packages and apply design are prepared for review, and the next safe step is human approval plus a separate guarded execution artifact.

completed_master_index.reason: The English Master Index is complete as reference truth, but reference completion is not DB write authority.
completed_master_index.next_action: Use this as the target for row-level dry-run write packages only.

master_verified_monitor_only.reason: Already verified by the current index. Monitor only unless a future drift audit finds divergence.
master_verified_monitor_only.next_action: Keep Ascended Heroes proof loop as the reference pattern.

api_agreed_by_index.reason: API agreement is not master truth for finish/printing rows.
api_agreed_by_index.next_action: Acquire human-readable/checklist evidence before controlled normalization.

candidate_unconfirmed_by_index.reason: Single-source evidence is not canonical truth.

unsupported_by_current_index.reason: Unsupported by current index is not deletion authority.
unsupported_by_current_index.next_action: Run set-level proof loops with master_verified evidence before any cleanup proposal.

missing_from_grookai.reason: Missing from Grookai is not insertion authority.
missing_from_grookai.next_action: Only master_verified rows may enter a future controlled insertion plan.

name_mismatch_needs_review.reason: Name mismatch is not identity rewrite authority.
name_mismatch_needs_review.next_action: Resolve exact source card identity and alias policy first.

set_unmapped_total.reason: Unmapped set rows cannot be normalized safely without source identity.
set_unmapped_total.next_action: Use provenance recovery lanes before any repair design.

missing_set_code_physical_candidates.reason: A master-verified subset exists, but the overall physical recovery lane still contains identity and finish-blocked rows.
missing_set_code_physical_candidates.next_action: Design a dry-run package for the master-verified subset only; keep blocked remainder out.

missing_set_code_pocket_scope_candidates.reason: Pocket/digital aliases are outside English physical TCG scope.
missing_set_code_pocket_scope_candidates.next_action: Make explicit product-scope decision before any isolation/quarantine proposal.

missing_set_code_marketplace_lookup_requ.reason: Marketplace IDs require source URL resolution and second-source confirmation.

missing_set_code_manual_review.reason: No usable source set alias is available.

source_acquisition_queue.reason: The completion report has no remaining Master Index source-gap queue items. Historical source-acquisition queues remain planning context only.
source_acquisition_queue.next_action: Proceed to row-level dry-run package design for eligible subsets; do not run writes.

finish_blocker_boundary.reason: Former finish blockers were adjudicated out of working truth and are no longer completion blockers.
finish_blocker_boundary.next_action: Keep adjudicated exclusions preserved as audit evidence; do not use them for writes.

adjudicated_excluded_printings.reason: These facts are preserved as reviewed exclusions, not deletion, insertion, or cleanup authority.
adjudicated_excluded_printings.next_action: Keep excluded unless new exact evidence reopens adjudication.

truth_readiness_sets.reason: Truth readiness ranks risk; it does not authorize writes.
truth_readiness_sets.next_action: Use only to choose next proof-loop targets.

repair_priority_sets.reason: Repair priority is a future planning aid only.
repair_priority_sets.next_action: Use after evidence acquisition, not before.

provenance_recovery_leads.reason: Provenance recovery leads are not canonical truth.
provenance_recovery_leads.next_action: Promote only through source-backed proof loops.
